claim: Self-improving agents require explicit feedback loops that capture task failures, analyze root causes, and update the agent's decision process in subsequent attempts.
actionable: Implement feedback collection on agent failures and iterate the agent's behavior through reinforcement or fine-tuning on failure cases.
source_title: Inside Hermes Agent | How a Self-Improving AI Agent Actually Works | Tech Edge AI

claim: Hermes agent architecture separates perception, reasoning, and action modules to allow independent optimization of each component.
actionable: Architect agents with modular perception, reasoning, and action components so each can be optimized and debugged independently.
source_title: Inside Hermes Agent | How a Self-Improving AI Agent Actually Works | Tech Edge AI
